publicService.title: Commissioner, Planning & Zoning Committee
publicService.description: Appointed to the Planning & Zoning Committee — review development proposals, zoning changes, and land-use decisions affecting community growth.
responsibilities: Review and evaluate development proposals and zoning applications
Participate in public hearings and community engagement sessions
Collaborate with city planners and community stakeholders

publicService.title: Community Youth Group Leader
publicService.description: Guided youth in organizing skills training, community service projects, and outdoor recreation. Focus on character development and leadership.
responsibilities: Guide youth in organizing workshops and activities
Mentor in leadership and character development

publicService.title: Census Enumerator
publicService.description: Conducted door-to-door interviews and demographic data collection for the 2020 U.S. Census.
responsibilities: Conducted household interviews and collected demographic data
Maintained confidentiality and data security protocols

publicService.title: Cub Scout Leader
publicService.description: Led and mentored young scouts in character development, outdoor skills, and leadership training.
responsibilities: Plan and execute weekly den meetings and activities
Mentor youth in leadership and character development
